svg.text: Welding heat-source path evidence: x=v·t, y=A·sin(2πft)
A=3 mm, f=2 Hz, v=3 mm/s. Full 100 mm plate needs 33.33 s; current CFD ran only 0.35 s, x=1.05 mm.

g.text: Blue: full physical sinusoidal path over 100 mm plate, about 66.7 cycles.
Red: actually simulated time window in B1/B2. It only covers about 1.05 mm, so the weld bead cannot look like a full sinusoidal seam yet.
For the existing 30 mm local model, a physical-speed full pass needs 10.0 s, about 20.0 sinusoidal cycles.
